title: Multiple synthesis issues with SystemVerilog designs: hanging, frontend detection, memory handling, and security assertion limitations

features.name: large unpacked memory array 64K entries
features.description: Code should include a large unpacked memory array with 64K or more entries (65536 or higher depth)

features.name: sva property declaration with clocking
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog property declaration with clocking block using @(posedge clk)

features.name: assert property with else error clause
features.description: Code should include an assert property statement with an else clause that calls $error
features.snippet: assert property (addr_bounds) else $error("Address out of bounds");

features.name: conditional compilation with YOSYS_SYNTHESIS guard
features.description: Code should include conditional compilation using `ifdef YOSYS_SYNTHESIS to provide alternative logic

features.name: implication operator in SVA property
features.description: Code should include an SVA property using the implication operator (|->) for conditional sequences
